name: S. Abiramaiah
description: We are delighted to inform you of your appointment as the Karnataka State President, within the Maha Seva Dal organization. This decision comes as a result of the organization's strong belief in your potential to significantly contribute to our mission of serving the poor people's, developing society, and fostering youth development in sports and education.
responsibilities: Spearheading and coordinating Seva activities aimed at assisting the underprivileged in Karnataka State.
Developing and implementing programs focused on societal development and upliftment.
Leading initiatives that promote youth engagement in sports and provide educational support.
Building and nurturing a strong network of volunteers and supporters within the Karnataka State.
Representing Maha Seva Dal at Karnataka forums and collaborating with relevant Stakeholders.

description: We are pleased to share that the Tamil Nadu Legal Wing of the Maha Seva Dal has been successfully established. The team was appointed by Mr.S. Srinivasan under the direct advice of National Advisor Mr. M. Chuba Ao. We extent our congratulation to the new appointees and look forwad to their contributions.

We are pleased to share that the Jharkhand State Team of the Maha Seva Dal has been successfully established. The team was appointed by Mr.S. Shree Ram gopu under the direct advice of National Advisor Mr. M. Chuba Ao. We extent our congratulation to the new appointees and look forwad to their contributions.

name: T Ashuhrii Romeo
description: We are delighted to inform you of your appointment as the North east India Incharge within the Maha Seva Dal organization. This decision comes as a result of the organization's strong belief in your potential to significantly contribute to our mission of serving the poor people's, developing society, and fostering youth development in sports and education.
responsibilities: Spearheading and coordinating Seva activities aimed at assisting the underprivileged in North east India.
